original_image_tags: A heavily degraded, low-contrast scan of a typed document. The text is extremely faint, appearing as light gray against a dark gray, mottled background, making it largely illegible. Two dark, circular punch holes are visible at the top edge. The bottom portion of the page contains a clear, red rubber stamp imprint.

elements.description: Red ink stamped text at the bottom left, oriented upside down relative to the typed text. The stamp contains three lines of text: 'FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER' above 'MARCH' (or possibly 'MAR 1'), and 'TRANSMITTED' below. There are two hole punches at the top center.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of two hole punches at the top and a red rubber stamp at the bottom, but Description B adds specific quoted text from the stamp ('FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER', 'MARCH', 'TRANSMITTED') that Description A does not mention, without contradiction.
